title: Craftable
description: Make rare and uncraftable Minecraft items craftable!
body:
# Description
**Craftable** is a plugin/mod that adds recipes for items normally unobtainable through crafting in Minecraft. With Craftable, players can craft rare and endgame items such as Elytra, Totems of Undying, Saddles, Name Tags, Horse Armor, Chainmail Armor, and Reinforced Deepslate. This allows servers to give players access to hard-to-get items without relying solely on mob drops or loot chests.

The plugin automatically registers recipes when the server starts. Recipes are designed to be balanced and intuitive, using logical ingredient combinations.

Craftable is ideal for servers that want to enhance gameplay by making rare items craftable while keeping the experience challenging and fun.

There are no external dependencies. _Java 21 or higher is required._

# Craftable items
Recipes can be seen in the Gallery tab
- Name Tag
  
- Totem of Undying
  
- Trident
  
- Elytra
  
- Enchanted Golden Apple (Notch Apple)
  
- Experience Bottles (Bottle o’ Enchanting)
  
- Reinforced Deepslate

- Heart of The Sea

- Bell
### Horse Armor
- Copper
  
- Iron
  
- Gold
  
- Diamond
  
### Chainmail Armor
  
- Helmet
  
- Chestplate
  
- Leggings
  
- Boots
